title: NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) — Cisco ISE ANC Closed-Loop Effectiveness Evidence
evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) tagging.

compliance.assurance_rationale: NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) — incident handling effectiveness. UC-17.1.80 produces continuous evidence that automated containment actions actually stop the attack.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate that incident response containment (ANC quarantine) actually stops malicious activity within target time, not just that the API call was made.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.2.58' archiving quarantine-to-stop time KPI evidence to `audit_evidence` with `nis2_clause=Art.21(2)(b)`.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Quarantine fires; attack stops within 2 min. Healthy KPI evidence.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Quarantine ineffective. Evidence captured for remediation.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode=86001 anc_action=quarantine earliest=-1d
| eval anc_time=_time, endpoint_mac=mac
| join endpoint_mac [search index=notable severity=high earliest=-1d | rename _time as last_attack_time]
| eval quarantine_to_stop=anc_time - last_attack_time
| stats avg(quarantine_to_stop) as avg_seconds, count by anc_policy
| eval nis2_clause="Art.21(2)(b)", control="Containment_Effectiveness"
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) — that automated containment is effective.
value: NIS2 audit will probe incident response effectiveness. This UC produces measurable, machine-attested evidence of containment efficacy — not just policy.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for NIS2 quarterly review.
knownFalsePositives: 1. Endpoint moved to non-NAC port post-quarantine.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.80 operational.
- ES Notable framework integrated.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.2.58: NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) — Containment Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.2.58,reg=NIS2,clause=Art.21(2)(b)
```

Quarterly review with NIS2 ARCSI/regulator.
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence NIS2 Art.21(2)(b) — that automated containment is effective. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.
